description: Schema for <source>/ishconfig/config.toml (repo-level settings, lower priority than ~/.config/ishfiles/config.toml).

ishfiles.description: Core ishfiles settings shared across all checkouts of this dotfile repo.

default_shell.description: Desired login shell (basename like 'zsh' or absolute path like '/usr/bin/zsh'). Applied via chsh at the end of 'ishfiles apply'.

title: ishfiles repo configuration
